56720.title: Non-Stop 80s Hits!
56720.description: We got hits... We got hits from the 80s. And guess what? They don't stop! IT'S WHAT IT SAYS ON THE TIN! You're welcome!

56721.title: Gold! Greatest Hits Of The 80s
56721.description: Pencil us in because we've organised the greatest hits of the '80s for you...you're welcome!

56722.title: 40 Best 80s Debut Hits!
56722.description: The first hit is always the best - so get ready as we bring you 40 of the most memorable debuts of the 1980s!

56723.title: MTV's Sounds Of 1988!
56723.description: We're powering-up the time machine and going back to celebrate the first years of our MTV lives! This time we land in... 1988!

56724.title: Super 80s Pop Hits!
56724.description: Join us for the ultimate 80s pop playlist that will make you want to get up and dance!

56725.title: MTV 80s At The Movies!
56725.description: MTV 80s is heading to big screen! Take a look at the biggest hits from the biggest movies of the 80s.

56726.title: Greatest 80s Rock: Play It Loud!
56726.description: Hard! Alternative! Heavy! Post-punk! Metal! Indie! Goth! Call it what you want, but turn up the volume as we delve into the decade's best rock tracks in all their incarnations, right here on MTV!

56727.title: ... So 80s!
56727.description: Get ready because we're bringing you nothing but classic hits and iconic anthems from the 80s!
